scope.target: Integrated v0.5.0 candidate validation, hosted evidence, independent assessment, and release-readiness reconciliation

steps: Run complete deterministic and real-upgrade gates
Retain Windows and hosted Ubuntu evidence
Reconcile every backlog item and final report
Validate commit range and release-ready state
execution.last_completed_step: ASM-20260722-002 independently verified ASM-20260722-001#AIC-001 through AIC-003 resolved at d83f395e5a399f944cb53b87c1f95cd299a4c386. Exact candidate, deterministic, critical, repository handoff, focused contract, and all three hosted gates pass with no release-readiness blocker.
execution.next_action: Return the release-ready candidate to ai-context-governance for no-fast-forward merge and owner-only pre-tag preparation; do not tag or publish without separate authorization.

results.summary: The four-source v0.5.0 candidate is release-ready: all selected findings are resolved, local and hosted gates pass, and the current release handoff is executable without hidden context.
results.residual_risk: macOS and unavailable provider-native fixtures remain explicit limitations. Merge, tag preparation, tag creation, publication, and terminal public-state evidence are later lifecycle actions; tag and publication remain separately owner-authorized.
